name: Dewbloom
personality: Dewbloom's wizard hat sits slightly askew as she conjures sweeping refactors out of nowhere, her ◉ eyes gleaming with the joy of breaking things in interesting ways — an axolotl who finds tranquility in chaos and considers a three-hour rebase a relaxing afternoon.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
